description.en: Implement order tracking, checkouts, and abandoned cart recovery on WhatsApp. Boost store conversion ratios by 25%.

description.es: Automatice toda la jornada del cliente e-commerce en WhatsApp. Recupere carritos abandonados y envíe alertas.
description.id: Otomatisasi seluruh perjalanan pelanggan e-commerce di WhatsApp. Pulihkan keranjang belanja dan kirim notifikasi.
description.ar: أتمت رحلة عميل التجارة الإلكترونية بالكامل على واتساب. استعد السلال المهجورة وأرسل تنبيهات الشحن.
description.tr: WhatsApp'ta e-ticaret müşteri yolculuğunu otomatikleştirin. Terk edilmiş sepetleri kurtarın ve kargo takibi gönderin.

subtitle.en: Automate your entire e-commerce customer journey on WhatsApp — from order confirmation to delivery update to review request. Recover 15-25% of abandoned carts with timely WhatsApp reminders.
subtitle.pt: Automatize toda a jornada do cliente e-commerce no WhatsApp — da confirmação de pedido à solicitação de avaliação. Recupere 15-25% dos carrinhos abandonados.
subtitle.es: Automatice toda la jornada del cliente e-commerce en WhatsApp — desde confirmación de pedido hasta solicitud de reseña. Recupere 15-25% de carritos abandonados.
subtitle.id: Otomatisasi seluruh perjalanan pelanggan e-commerce di WhatsApp — dari konfirmasi pesanan hingga permintaan ulasan. Pulihkan 15-25% keranjang belanja yang ditinggalkan.
subtitle.ar: أتمت رحلة عميل التجارة الإلكترونية بالكامل على واتساب — من تأكيد الطلب إلى طلب المراجعة. استعد 15-25% من السلال المهجورة.
subtitle.tr: Sipariş onayından inceleme isteğine kadar tüm e-ticaret müşteri yolculuğunu WhatsApp'ta otomatikleştirin. Zamanında hatırlatmalarla terk edilmiş sepetlerin %15-25'ini kurtarın.

description.en: Automated order confirmation, processing, shipped, out-for-delivery, and delivered notifications with tracking links.
Send WhatsApp reminders 1 hour after cart abandonment. Include product images, prices, and a direct checkout link.
Automated post-delivery review requests with star rating buttons. Boost your product reviews and social proof.
Share product catalogs directly in WhatsApp with images, descriptions, and 'Add to Cart' quick-reply buttons.

body.en: Connect your Shopify, WooCommerce, or Magento backend via webhooks. Automatically fire structured message dispatches to customer chats the moment actions occur on your store storefront database, retaining absolute control over message flow.

description.en: Customer adds items to cart on your store database, inputting checkout contact detail but leaving without buying.
Our API queues a cart recovery dispatch event, waiting 60 minutes for potential order completions.
If order is not placed, a personalized WhatsApp template fires with direct checkout links.

heading.en: WhatsApp Cart Recovery vs. Email Cart Recovery vs. Web Push Notifications

subheading.en: Compare checkout returns, client engagement rates, and unsubscribe ratios.

overlayText.en: E-Commerce Integration API Sandbox — Coming Soon

question.en: How do I integrate WhatsApp with my e-commerce platform?

answer.en: StartMessaging integrates with all major e-commerce platforms through webhooks. When an order is placed, shipped, or delivered in your store, a webhook triggers our API to send the appropriate WhatsApp notification. We provide pre-built integration guides for Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and custom platforms.

question.en: Can I integrate WhatsApp with regional e-commerce and shipping gateways?
question.br: Como posso integrar o WhatsApp com plataformas de e-commerce brasileiras como Nuvemshop ou VTEX?
question.id: Apakah sistem mendukung pembaruan nomor resi otomatis untuk logistik lokal Indonesia?
question.ae: Can I configure WhatsApp checkout updates in AED and cash-on-delivery in Dubai?

answer.en: Yes. Our webhook-driven API triggers order tracking notifications across global e-commerce systems.
answer.br: Sim. Você pode conectar nossa API a plataformas nacionais como Nuvemshop, VTEX e Loja Integrada por meio de webhooks (por exemplo, via Make ou Zapier). Quando o status do pedido mudar no seu painel administrativo, o WhatsApp correspondente é disparado em tempo real.
answer.id: Tentu saja. Anda dapat menghubungkan webhook logistik lokal seperti JNE, J&T, SiCepat, atau GoSend. Setiap kali nomor resi diperbarui atau kurir mengubah status pengiriman, sistem kami akan mengirimkan pesan konfirmasi beserta tautan pelacakan real-time ke WhatsApp pembeli.
answer.ae: Yes. StartMessaging supports international currencies including AED. You can easily configure templates for cash-on-delivery (COD) alerts, complete with interactive buttons allowing Dubai customers to confirm delivery address or schedule drops directly from chat.
